root_cause: Token limit (8192) was too small for long HTML/Tailwind content and reasoning chain.
solution: Increased max_output_tokens to 32768 in global_config.json and fixed model_settings missing in fallback logic.
verification_steps: Ran repro script with full coffee shop landing page request
prevention_measures: Regularly review token limits for new model versions
Ensure config settings are propagated in all execution paths
impact_scope: DeepSeek Reasoner users generating long content
